description:
GIVEN a subscriber is located international not in Canada
AND a postseason game has FS1 broadcasters assigned
AND the away feed level fs1AuthRequired = true
AND feed level mediaState = MEDIA_ON

steps.action: WHEN the subscriber selects the FS1 postseason game tile
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal displays
AND the FS1 International (FS1-INT) feed button is the only button displayed in the modal
AND the user is able to receive playback after selecting the feed button
